body.title: Granny must never spawn CC — ESCALATE goes to hold
body.text:
# D-granny-no-cc-spawn-2026-05-31
**title:** Granny must never spawn CC — ESCALATE goes to hold
**date:** 2026-05-31
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-granny-escalate-hold
**goal_link:** C-system-availability (CC must remain accessible)
**concept_links:** none

## Decision narrative
Every unplanned CC blackout has been caused by Granny spawning Claude workers. The ESCALATE path in inference_dispatch_fn must call cc_queue.py block, not _launch_cc_instance. Escalated tickets surface at next CC review session with Akien. No exceptions.

## Hypothesis
No automated process ever spawns a CC worker again.

## Measurement Signal
Zero CC blackouts caused by automated dispatch after ship.

## Goal Link
C-system-availability — CC must remain accessible to Akien at all times

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
